The classification of Callista longicornis includes the kingdom Animalia, phylum Mollusca, class Bivalvia, order Veneroida, and family Veneridae. Additionally, it is further classified within the genus Callista as Callista (Venerupis) longicornis. The classification may vary slightly depending on the source and the specific taxonomic system used.
